violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar . Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Cheese was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, cheese was placed in the prep unit 2.5 hours prior to inspection. Cheese was relocated to the walk-in cooler to cool. Cheese was observed stored over the fill line. Establishment must not store food over the fill line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Pasta salad was observed expired. Pasta salad must not be held past 7 days. Pasta was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution for the sanitizing bucket was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
An insect control device (light trap) was observed installed above a cold-hold unit. Insect control devices must not be stored above food storage areas. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Food was observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

At the time of inspection, the chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher at the Bar was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. (At the time of inspection, the Chlorine Sanitizer Chemical Bottle was not connected to the sanitizer tubing of the dish machine. Bottle connected at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the Basement Walk-In Cooler Fan Cover was observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023
